problem id: 8b4c71ba
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR ROT(5)

examples:
  01000111 -> 11101110
  01100000 -> 11001100
  01111110 -> 11111111
  10011100 -> 10111011
  10001011 -> 01110111
  00001101 -> 10111011
  10111010 -> 01110111
  01111101 -> 11111111
  01111000 -> 11111111
  01111100 -> 11111111

query: 01100100
predicted answer: 11001100
